department: Lipa City Planning and Development Office

external_services.service_name: Approval for Alteration of Plan Permit
external_services.office: Lipa City Planning and Development Office

steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.13. Evaluate plans, prepare analysis, secure SP ordinance, compute fees, and issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: CPDC / Zoning Officer III / Sangguniang Panlungsod

steps.client_step: 2. Pay corresponding fee at City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Based on Table (e.g., PD 957: P12k-P20k/ha; BP 220: P6k/ha)

steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.6. Prepare Alteration Permit, obtain Mayor's signature, and release plans

total.fees: Based on Density and Project Type (PD 957, BP 220, or Memorial Park)

external_services.service_name: Approval of Subdivision Development Plan and Issuance of Development Permit
external_services.office: Lipa City Planning and Development Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: PALC Requirements (TCT, Tax Dec, Zoning Cert, Barangay Reso, DA/PCA Clearances)
checklist_of_requirements.source: Various (Registry of Deeds, Assessor, DA, PCA)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Development Permit Requirements (Revised Plan, DAR Conversion, ECC, BATELEC/MLWD/NWRB Certs)

steps.agency_action: 1.1-3.3. Evaluate plans, compute fees, and release Preliminary Approval (PALC)

steps.client_step: 2. Submit revised plans for Final Approval
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.6. Review revised plans and prepare final recommendation
1.1-3.6. Secure Mayor's signature on DP and release plans

total.fees: PALC Fee + DP Fee (Variable by Area/Density)

external_services.service_name: Issuance of Locational Clearance for New Business
external_services.office: Lipa City Planning and Development Office

checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Proof of ownership or Lease Contract

steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.9. Evaluate docs; Conduct site inspection (if needed); Compute fees

steps.client_step: 2. Pay corresponding fee at City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
3.1. Prepare, sign, and release Locational Clearance

external_services.service_name: Issuance of Locational Clearance for New Business
external_services.office: Lipa City Planning and Development Office

checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Proof of ownership or Lease Contract

steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.9. Evaluate docs; Conduct site inspection (if needed); Compute fees

steps.client_step: 2. Pay corresponding fee at City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
3.1. Prepare, sign, and release Locational Clearance
1.1-1.9. Receive docs, conduct building inspection (1 day, 4 hrs), verify against Locational Clearance, compute fees, and issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Zoning Inspector / Economist II / Zoning Officer III

steps.client_step: 2. Pay corresponding fee at City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
3.1-3.2. Sign for Land Use/Zoning and release Occupancy Certificate

external_services.office: Lipa City Planning and Development Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Vicinity map/lot plan (signed/sealed by Geodetic Engineer)

steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.7. Receive request, conduct 2-day site inspection, evaluate application, prepare/sign Zoning Certificate and endorsement letter to City Administrator

total.fees: P10.00/sq.m. (Processing Fee paid after SP Ordinance passage)
total.processing_time: 2 days, 2 hours and 2 minutes (Internal CPDO time)

external_services.service_name: Request for Certified True Copy of Documents
external_services.office: Lipa City Planning and Development Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Walk-in request (Photocopy of document if available)

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to CPDO and request document
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.5. Validate copy/print file, prepare and sign Order of Payment

steps.client_step: 2. Pay Secretary's fee at City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
3-4. Sign and release certified document
steps.person_responsible: Planning Officer IV / Administrative Assistant IV

external_services.office: Lipa City Planning and Development Office

steps.client_step: 1. Present ID and register in Logbook
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.4. Locate materials, allow photocopying, prepare and sign Order of Payment

steps.client_step: 2. Pay Secretary's fee at City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
3. Release the data/document
